---
title: "clustering - Consistent Cluster Size"
date: "2026-04-30"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(mvtnorm)
library(scatterplot3d)
library(cluster)
library(kernlab)
library(dbscan)

set.seed(865)

source("functions.R")
source("datasim.R")
```

# Convex data with consistent cluster size

```{r}
# convex data with two non-overlapping clusters and consistent cluster size
scatterplot3d(X,color=trueX,pch=19)
```

```{r}
out <- run_methods(X, trueX, k = 2)
out$results
```


```{r}
# convex data with two overlapping clusters and consistent cluster size
scatterplot3d(X2,color=trueX2,pch=19)
```
```{r}
out <- run_methods(X2, trueX2, k = 2,
                   db_eps = 1.4,
                   db_minPts = 4,
                   hdb_minPts = 4)
out$results
```

# Non-convex data with consistent cluster size

```{r}
# non-convex data in the shape of a triple helix with three non-overlapping 
# clusters and consistent cluster size
scatterplot3d(X3,color=trueX3,pch=19)
```

```{r}
out <- run_methods(X3, trueX3, k = 3)
out$results
```

```{r}
# non-convex data of a saddle and spring forming two overlapping clusters
# with consistent cluster size, n=500
scatterplot3d(X4,pch=19,color=trueX4)
```

```{r}
out <- run_methods(X4, trueX4, k = 2,
                   db_minPts = 4,
                   hdb_minPts = 4)
out$results
```
